task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Interleaved 2 of 5 (ITF) scanning is enabled in bcWebCam
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings or configuration menu in bcWebCam is open, and the checkbox or toggle for 'Interleaved 2 of 5' (or ITF) is selected/enabled.

task_completion.description: The barcode is scanned and decoded by bcWebCam
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam interface displays a decoded numeric string (the Bates number) resulting from scanning the barcode visible on the camera feed or screen.

task_completion.description: The target directory containing the evidence document is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer is open and navigated to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LegalCase'.

task_completion.description: The evidence document is renamed to the decoded Bates number
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the File Explorer ('C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LegalCase'), the file originally named 'evidence_document.pdf' is now renamed to exactly match the decoded numeric string from bcWebCam (e.g., '1234567890.pdf').

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual bcWebCam GUI to configure settings and scan the barcode.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the bcWebCam application interface being clicked and configured, rather than terminal commands or scripts being executed to simulate the scan.

integrity.description: The agent used the File Explorer GUI to rename the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file being renamed within the Windows File Explorer interface, without the use of Command Prompt or PowerShell.

integrity.description: The Bates number used for renaming matches the actual scan result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The new filename exactly matches the decoded numeric string shown in the bcWebCam application window, proving the agent didn't hallucinate or hardcode a random number.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LegalCase' and the original file is 'evidence_document.pdf'. The final filename must be '[decoded_number].pdf' where [decoded_number] is the exact numeric string output by bcWebCam.
